title: cleistocactus anguinus
intro: Cleistocactus anguinus, also known as the 'red dragon flower', is a species of cactus found in the Andes mountains of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can be used to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Cleistocactus anguinus include its ability to aid in the healing process, reduce pain and inflammation, and even help to fight against certain types of bacteria and viruses. Herbal preparations of Cleistocactus anguinus can be made into ointments, tinctures, and infusions, which can be applied topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
